def handle_event(event_type, mode):
    # Violation: type branch and mode branch compounded in the same function (high complexity)
    if event_type == "upload":
        if mode == "async":
            process_async_upload()
        else:
            process_sync_upload()
    elif event_type == "delete":
        if mode == "async":
            process_async_delete()
        else:
            process_sync_delete()
